item.title: JohnStrege: Kyle Porter reposteó John Strege @JohnStrege · 4min Big fan of the CBS golf crew. Nantz, seriously a nice man and the be
item.description: Kyle Porter reposteó John Strege @JohnStrege · 4min Big fan of the CBS golf crew. Nantz, seriously a nice man and the best in the business. Trevor Immelmann, major champion, easy on the ears. Dottie Pepper, so good at this. Mark Immelmann under appreciated. Johnson Wagner, a great addition. 3 1 23 1 mil

item.title: JustinRayGolf: Justin Ray @JustinRayGolf · 4min Matt Fitzpatrick is projected to move to 3rd in the Official World Golf Ranking, the be
item.description:
Justin Ray @JustinRayGolf · 4min Matt Fitzpatrick is projected to move to 3rd in the Official World Golf Ranking, the best position of his career.
He was 79th at this time last year. 1 3 21 1 mil

item.description: Kyle Porter @KylePorterNS · 6min Trying to explain to my Hazeltine self that I kinda love ... Justin Rose and Matt Fitzpatrick. 3 1 43 3 mil

item.title: NUCLRGOLF: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 6min #WINNING MOMENT — Matt Fitzpatrick comes up CLUTCH on the 1st playoff hole to win The RBC
item.description:
NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 6min #WINNING MOMENT — Matt Fitzpatrick comes up CLUTCH on the 1st playoff hole to win The RBC Heritage for a second time.
@MattFitzLegion De PGA TOUR 2 53 4 mil
